user_stories: As a logged-in user, I want to ask questions in chat and get streaming answers, so that I can receive guidance immediately.
As a cautious user, I want unsafe prompts to be intercepted, so that I can avoid harmful or policy-violating output.
As a paid/free tier user, I want quota checks before response generation, so that usage stays aligned with my plan.
flow_logic_text: User submits message -> API authenticates user -> guard safety check + ensure thread -> load/trim history -> determine mode+quota -> stream model output -> persist assistant response -> consume credit (if success).
If primary model fails -> fallback agent invoked -> stream fallback result -> persist response -> no primary credit deduction on failed path.
core_features.related_business_capability: 提供聊天、追问建议、自动补全与可恢复流式输出接口，并在请求链路内执行安全检查、额度校验与消息落库。

core_features.module_name: 多语言 Web 应用层
user_stories: As a visitor, I want localized pages and onboarding routes, so that I can understand and use the product in my language.
As a returning user, I want a protected dashboard for chat/bazi/settings, so that I can manage my personal data and sessions.
As a mobile user, I want responsive interaction components, so that I can complete divination flows smoothly on phone.
flow_logic_text: User opens locale route -> layout loads i18n/messages -> page fetches server data/actions -> render feature components -> user interaction triggers API or server action -> UI updates with response.
Protected route access -> auth gate check -> allow dashboard or redirect to login.
core_features.related_business_capability: 承载登录、落地页、博客、聊天、八字、设置、星图等前端页面与路由布局。

user_stories: As a user with different question types, I want the system to auto-select suitable AI mode/agent, so that the answer style matches my intent.
As a user expecting reliability, I want fallback models when primary model fails, so that I still receive a usable response.
As a user asking for divination, I want tool-augmented reasoning (e.g., liuyao/bazi helpers), so that outputs are grounded in domain logic.
flow_logic_text: Input messages/profile -> classifier/mode resolver selects effective mode -> provider+prompt+tools assembled -> model stream starts -> tool calls executed -> final response returned.
Error/timeout/limit from primary provider -> fallback policy check -> fallback provider stream -> return resilient output.
core_features.related_business_capability: 封装模型 Provider、提示词、工具调用、意图分类与降级策略，向上提供稳定 AI 能力。

user_stories: As a user, I want my thread history to persist, so that I can continue conversations later.
As a user editing a previous message, I want downstream messages truncated and regenerated, so that the thread remains coherent.
As a user, I want chat titles auto-generated, so that I can quickly find past conversations.
flow_logic_text: Request to start/continue thread -> ensureThread -> save user message -> query historical messages -> return ordered thread data.
User edits earlier message -> truncateMessagesFrom target -> regenerate downstream via chat API -> persist new round.
core_features.related_business_capability: 管理线程生命周期、消息读写、标题生成、反馈与流状态，供 API 与页面调用。

user_stories: As a user, I want to create and manage multiple bazi profiles, so that I can analyze myself and related people separately.
As a subscribed user, I want profile-count limits enforced by tier, so that plan boundaries are clear and fair.
As a user, I want tags and pinning for bazi records, so that I can organize frequent profiles efficiently.
flow_logic_text: Create bazi request -> auth -> validate tags/name -> check tier profile limit -> write record -> return success record.
Update/delete/archive request -> verify ownership + non-primary constraints -> mutation -> return action result.
core_features.related_business_capability: 负责八字档案 CRUD、标签校验、配额限制与主档案规则。

user_stories: As a user, I want to generate my star-map report from birth data, so that I can understand long-term life patterns.
As a user, I want chapter-by-chapter regeneration when one section fails, so that I do not need to rerun the entire report.
As a user, I want report progress polling, so that I can track generation status in real time.
flow_logic_text: Generate report request -> auth -> read star-map config -> derive analysis context -> create empty report -> async generate chapters -> persist per chapter -> expose progress polling.
Regenerate single chapter -> build context -> run chapter generator -> update stored chapter -> revalidate page cache.
core_features.related_business_capability: 负责人生星图生成、报告章节生成与查询、重绘流程与缓存刷新。

user_stories: As a user, I want feature access determined by my current tier, so that premium capabilities are correctly unlocked.
As a user, I want remaining credits and quota visible, so that I can plan my usage.
As an operator, I want unified entitlement checks, so that business rules are consistent across API and UI.
flow_logic_text: Feature/quota check request -> load user tier/subscription -> compute access + remaining quota -> return decision to caller.
Credit consume/reset/set -> mutation applied -> updated quota reflected in subsequent checks.
core_features.related_business_capability: 统一管理 tier、feature、quota、credits 的查询与判定能力。

user_stories: As a paying user, I want subscription status synchronized from payment events, so that my plan access updates automatically.
As a user, I want current subscription details retrievable, so that I can verify billing state.
As an admin/dev, I want controlled subscription mutation helpers, so that I can test and maintain lifecycle states.
flow_logic_text: Subscription event/internal update -> upsert subscription row -> status/period fields updated -> entitlement layer reads latest valid subscription.
Query request -> return current subscription details for user/settings UI.
core_features.related_business_capability: 管理订阅记录读写与状态同步（与支付/认证插件对齐）。

user_stories: As a new user, I want signup/login and email verification flows, so that I can securely access my account.
As a user who forgot password, I want reset actions with token validation, so that I can regain account access safely.
As a security-conscious user, I want password change/set actions with validation, so that credentials remain protected.
flow_logic_text: Auth form submit -> parse and zod-validate fields -> invoke auth provider action -> map provider errors to localized messages -> return ActionResult.
Password reset path -> verify token -> enforce password rules -> commit new password -> redirect/confirm.
core_features.related_business_capability: 处理注册登录相关 Server Actions（找回密码、重置密码、邮箱验证、桥接 token 等）。

user_stories: As a user, I want to share my referral code, so that I can invite friends and earn rewards.
As a new user, I want referral code validation during onboarding, so that I can receive benefits if eligible.
As a growth team member, I want referral reward issuance tracked, so that campaign effects are measurable.
flow_logic_text: Inviter shares code -> invitee submits code -> system validates and binds referral relation -> reward credits granted per rule -> stats updated.
Referral info query -> aggregate code/reward stats -> return dashboard view model.
core_features.related_business_capability: 实现邀请码生成、校验、绑定与奖励发放。

user_stories: As a visitor, I want educational divination articles, so that I can learn before purchasing.
As a content editor, I want MDX-based publishing, so that I can maintain multilingual blog content efficiently.
flow_logic_text: Editor writes MDX content -> content stored under locale folder -> build/content pipeline indexes posts -> pages consume compiled content.
core_features.related_business_capability: 存放博客原始 MDX 内容。

user_stories: As a visitor, I want to browse posts by locale/category, so that I can find relevant content quickly.
As a reader, I want to open a post by slug with author metadata, so that I can trust and contextualize the article.
flow_logic_text: Blog page request -> query by locale/category/slug -> join author/category metadata -> return list/detail for UI rendering.
core_features.related_business_capability: 提供作者、分类、文章列表、文章详情等内容查询与格式化能力。
